scripts.dev:web: echo "apps/web is archived and no longer supported for active development."
scripts.build:web: echo "apps/web is archived and no longer built by default."
scripts.start: echo "Backend is Python; run 'cd irlobby_backend && python manage.py runserver'"
scripts.check:web:lint: echo "apps/web is archived and excluded from active checks."
scripts.check:web: echo "apps/web is archived and excluded from release checks."
scripts.check:mobile: npm --prefix apps/mobile run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/mobile run bundle:ios
scripts.check:release: npm run check:api-contract && npm run check:mobile
